meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. Use this Antigravity project template and Claude Code workflow to ship high-quality developer assets in record time.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap stalls careers. The Antigravity template solves this by automating boilerplate and architectural scaffolding, allowing you to ship production-grade SaaS MVPs in hours, not weeks. By leveraging Claude Code to iterate on these templates, you transform raw ideas into professional case studies that close high-ticket clients immediately.
content.intro:
The cold reality of freelancing is binary: you either have a portfolio that screams competence, or you are invisible. Clients don't care about your potential; they care about what you’ve shipped. Staring at an empty GitHub profile is a career-killer that keeps you trapped in low-paying, soul-crushing gigs.

But the tide is turning. With the Antigravity project template and the raw velocity of Claude Code, you can bridge the gap from 'novice' to 'pro' over a single weekend. Stop waiting for the perfect client to find you and start building the proof they are desperate to see.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project structure using the Antigravity template to ensure industry-standard folder organization and type safety from minute one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a clean, production-ready SaaS boilerplate using Antigravity standards with Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Core Business Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to flesh out the primary value proposition of your portfolio piece, ensuring the code is modular and testable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a robust authentication and user profile management module within the existing Antigravity structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement auth flow with supabase'

steps.title: Inject Professional UI Components
steps.description: Rapidly style your application using Antigravity's component library to ensure a polished, high-conversion look that impresses stakeholders.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply the Antigravity design system to the dashboard layout, ensuring responsive design and accessibility compliance.

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate schema definitions that align with your app's logic, preventing common runtime errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a SQL migration file for a subscription-based SaaS model with roles and permissions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate db migrations for subscription schema'

steps.title: Polish for Deployment
steps.description: Finalize your environment variables and CI/CD pipelines to ensure your portfolio piece is live, stable, and ready to show.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure production environment variables and optimize the build script for Vercel deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'optimize build and verify production config'

pro_tips: Always document the 'Why' behind your architectural choices in a README.md; clients hire developers who can explain their stack.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your core features; a tested repo is a sign of a senior engineer.
Keep your portfolio projects hyper-niche; a 'SaaS for Dentists' is more valuable than a generic 'To-Do App'.
Commit your history intentionally; clear, descriptive commit messages demonstrate professional project management habits.
Add a 'Future Roadmap' section to your README to show that you think beyond the MVP and understand product growth.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, record a 60-second Loom video demoing the app's functionality and add it to your LinkedIn featured section to start attracting inbound leads.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact blueprint to transform your coding skills into a tangible, profitable portfolio. Don't let another day pass with an empty GitHub profile. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
